---
layout: cv
title: Benjamin Clark's CV
---
# Benjamin Clark
Cook, Tour Guide, Coach Bus Driver, Computer Sience Student.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="benclark047@gmail.com">benclark047@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="https://benclark123.github.io/wdd130/">My Own Portfolio Website</a>
</div>


## Currently

Furthering my education.

### Specialized in

Computer Sience, Java, Blender, Animation, CDL driving, Burgers.


### Research interests

Astronomy, Rocket sience, Planets, 3d Animation styles, Coding languages.


## Education

`2009 - 2023`
__Public School.__

`June 1661 - now`
__Brigham Young University__




## Awards

`2022`
Award in excellence for 3D animation in High School. 



## Publications


Have yet to make any Publications but stay tuned.


## Occupation

`2025`
__Cook__, Texas


`2026`
__Coach Bus Driver & Tour Guide__, Alaska



<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
